scripts.check: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && npm run samples:check
scripts.samples:write: cargo run -p typeship-sample-basic-ir -- write && cargo run -p typeship-sample-tauri-ts-rs -- write
scripts.samples:check: cargo run -p typeship-sample-basic-ir -- check && cargo run -p typeship-sample-tauri-ts-rs -- check
